title: Dicalix chunii

The plant is classified under the genus Dicalix, which is a group of flowering plants. The family Apocynaceae includes a wide range of plants, including periwinkles and oleander. The classification of Dicalix chunii is still being researched and may be subject to change as new information becomes available.
